title: 1 x Devil's Ivy Golden Pothos Ivy Arum House Plant in 12cm White Ceramic Pot & Autumn Gold Gravel Top Dressing
features: Devils Ivy Epipremnum Aureus: 20-25cm Tall (including pot), Growing in 13cm White Ceramic Pot with autumn gold gravel top dressing
Ideal indoor plant for Office, Hall, Shops and etc.
Common names for Devil's ivy plant: Devil's Ivy, Pothos, Epipremnum aureum
description: Increase indoor oxygen concentration through photosymthesis. With the pure white ceramic pot, these elegant plants can bring stylish atmosphere into your house. These table plants are ideal for office, parlor, living room, restaurant, hotel, conservatory and etc.
